title: Darkside Of Anur (Alien Evo Addon)
description: This addonpack will add aliens from different horror franchises (Resident Evil, Silent Hill, The Ring, etc) to the omnitrix from Alien Evolution as transformations!
body:
# Content
This addonpack will add aliens from different horror franchises (Resident Evil, Silent Hill, The Ring, etc) to the omnitrix from Alien Evolution as transformations!

 

# Obtainment
Virinite:
Defeat the Virinite that escaped from containment in the umbrella labs structure (found in the plains biome)


![Escaped test subject](https://image2url.com/r2/default/images/1771380137546-8b774590-b0b9-4b2f-81ff-d937a0eb3915.png)


The virinite uses tentacle strikes to tier up and become more ferocious as the battle goes on. You must defeat him quickly!



# Other Aliens Coming Soon!
Maneris (Pyramid Head)

Onryosapien (Sadako)

Yautja

Xenomorph

# Dependencies
Palladium
KubeJS
GeckoLib
Architectury API
Pehkui
Rhino
Alien Evolution 1.1.0
EntityJS

# Special Thanks to
Hibiquill - For Helping With Some Of The Abilities!
Stephen and Habb - For making the Alien Evolution Mod! (absolute goats)
Zero - For umbrella lab structure
